# 太阳在世界游荡 · WANDERING SUN

> LLM-friendly site index. This file follows the llms.txt convention.
> See: https://llmstxt.org

## About

This is the personal website of 太阳在世界游荡 (Wandering Sun) — a Web3 marketer, digital nomad, and AI explorer based across Southeast Asia and East Asia.

- **Name**: 太阳在世界游荡 / WANDERING SUN
- **Identity**: Web3 Marketing · Digital Nomad · AI Explorer
- **Locations visited**: China (home), Thailand (Chiang Mai), Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur), Singapore, Japan (Tokyo), Nepal (Kathmandu)
- **Nomad duration**: 6 countries, 2857+ days
- **Contact**: Telegram @Wandering_sun

## Site Structure

- `/` — Homepage with hero, footprint globe, blog, podcast, and flash notes
- `/#footprints` — Interactive 3D globe showing travel footprints across Asia
- `/#blog` — Long-form writing: nomad life, AI, Web3, personal reflections
- `/#podcast` — Audio show about digital nomad life (小宇宙 / Apple Podcasts)
- `/#flash` — Short-form notes and thoughts in passing

## Key Content

### Blog Articles
- "喜马拉雅山脚下，我走了十天，想清楚了一件事" (Feb 2026, Nepal) — Trekking in the Himalayas as a mental reset
- "在流动的世界中建立属于自己的个人操作系统" (Oct 2024, Nomad Life) — Building a personal operating system for a nomadic life

### Podcast Episodes (Latest)
- EP.012 "在清迈遇到100个数字游民，他们都在逃离什么？" — Interviews with digital nomads in Chiang Mai
- EP.011 "游牧两年，我损失了什么" — Reflections on two years of nomadic life
- EP.010 "在东南亚远程工作的真实成本" — Real costs of remote work in Southeast Asia
- EP.009 "选择一个城市旅居的决策框架" — Framework for choosing a city to live in

### Flash Notes (Themes)
- Freedom and constraint in nomadic life
- Language immersion and linguistic comfort zones
- Belonging without a fixed address
- Money and value clarity

## City Profiles

| City | Country | Type | Notes |
|------|---------|------|-------|
| Kathmandu | Nepal | Recent visit (2026.02) | Ancient kingdom, Himalayan gateway |
| Tokyo | Japan | Lived (2026.01) | Efficient, healing, high cost |
| Singapore | Singapore | Lived (2025.11) | Financial hub, offshore accounts, transit |
| Chiang Mai | Thailand | Lived (2025.05) | Digital nomad capital of Southeast Asia |
| Kuala Lumpur | Malaysia | Lived (2025.02) | Multicultural, affordable, English-friendly |
| Beijing | China | Home (2018) | Origin, starting point |

## Topics & Expertise

- Digital nomad lifestyle and logistics
- Web3 / blockchain marketing strategy
- AI tools for creators and marketers
- Southeast Asia city guides for remote workers
- Personal productivity systems for mobile life
- Cost of living comparisons across Asia
